A seawall, behind the high-water line is proposed in order to stop further erosion of the site toward the shoreline. The already eroded soil, inland of the seawall, will be returned to a safe condition, at an average grade relative to the existing site survey, with a 2% positive slope for storm-water runoff. Side (south): Allowed side setback from property line =4'-1' (1.25m). Ist floor addition setback  =4'-8' (1.42m) from line. 2nd floor addition setback =4'-3' (1.3m) from line with soffit Incl.

Windows:
Glass Percentage: South side of Addition
- Existing = 10.6%
- Proposed  = 6.8%
